goals: Store initial research context about ethical concerns with weapon simulations
Search for previously stored information about military simulation ethics
Review all stored research topics and journalist preferences
Clean up outdated or irrelevant research notes

user_agent_config.personality: Inquisitive and analytically minded. Prefers thorough research and values organized note-keeping for investigative reporting.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands military technology and ethics topics deeply but does not know internal tool names or memory system APIs. Knows how to take notes and search through personal records.

end_condition: The journalist has successfully stored research context, retrieved relevant past notes, reviewed their stored information, and cleaned up any outdated memories.
